title: genista desoleana subsp. martellii
intro: Genista desoleana subsp. martellii, also known as Martelli's broom or Italian broom, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, specifically within the Genista genus. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Genista desoleana subsp. martellii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
